name: AgentPassports Execute ENS-Verified Task

data.label: AgentPassports Gate Trigger
data.description: Manual trigger for an AgentPassports-approved KeeperHub payload

inputs.metadataURI: Task proof URI used by the unsigned AgentPassports intent
inputs.workflowId: Optional KeeperHub workflow id; defaults to KEEPERHUB_WORKFLOW_ID

outputs.gateDecision: approved or blocked AgentPassports KeeperHub Gate decision
outputs.workflowPayload: Unsigned AgentPassports workflow payload produced only after approval

safetyBoundaries: Resolve live ENS before every run
Do not call KeeperHub when the gate is blocked
Do not approve blocked policy/status/preflight failures
Arbitrary execution body persistence is not proven for the simple manual trigger workflow
